candidates.why: A separate operating 'Depreciation' line exists above operating profit, but it is generic and not clearly tied to 'Property expenses'. With no explicit indication that it belongs to COGS/cost of sales, the conservative choice is not to add it to the selected COGS bucket to avoid misclassification or double counting.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Property expenses'. The standalone 'Depreciation' row is not explicitly labelled as COGS/property-expense depreciation.

candidates.why: 'Depreciation' appears as a separate operating line above operating profit and outside the selected XSGA component rows ('Administration expenses', 'Personnel Expenses', 'Other operating expenses'). Since the earlier XSGA selection explicitly excluded depreciation and there is no broader SG&A total that would already contain it for mapping purposes, this separate row should be added later.

variables.notes: Use the standalone operating 'Depreciation' row as XSGA-related D&A. No separate R&D row is present, and there is no more granular D&A summary/component structure to prefer.
